subtitles.original: Woo! Oh, we're getting towards the end of the live.
subtitles.english: Woo! Oh, we're getting towards the end of the live.

subtitles.original: There were so many beautiful songs...
subtitles.english: There were so many beautiful songs...

subtitles.original: ...and so many beautiful guests!
subtitles.english: ...and so many beautiful guests!

subtitles.original: I love the glasses, the Karisuma X Daisuke glasses. Good stuff!
subtitles.english: I love the glasses, the Karisuma X Daisuke glasses. Good stuff!

subtitles.original: And we're getting to the end, which means announcements! Yay!
subtitles.english: And we're getting to the end, which means announcements! Yay!

subtitles.original: Oh, but first off, before this live—I mean, after this live...
subtitles.english: Oh, but first off, before this live—I mean, after this live...

subtitles.original: ...there will be a members-only part as well, so join the Nefamily today!
subtitles.english: ...there will be a members-only part as well, so join the Nefamily today!

subtitles.original: えっと、この後もね、あのメン限パートもあるので...
subtitles.english: And after this, there will also be a members-only part...

subtitles.original: ...ぜひメンバーに、メンバーシップに入ってこーい！イエーイ！
subtitles.english: ...so please join the membership! Yay!

subtitles.original: 歌うんでね。Yes! Ah, okay then.
subtitles.english: I'll be singing there. Yes! Ah, okay then.

subtitles.original: Are you guys ready for the announcement?
subtitles.english: Are you guys ready for the announcement?

subtitles.original: すごく、すごく嬉しい告知があります！
subtitles.english: I have a very, very happy announcement to make!

subtitles.original: It's a big, big announcement, I'm really, really happy about it.
subtitles.english: It's a big, big announcement, I'm really, really happy about it.

subtitles.original: I can't wait! I'm super happy I get to share it with you guys.
subtitles.english: I can't wait! I'm super happy I get to share it with you guys.

subtitles.original: はい、嬉しい告知、行きます！
subtitles.english: Alright, here comes the happy announcement!

subtitles.original: まずは、こちらをご覧ください！ Please watch this short video.
subtitles.english: First, please take a look at this! Please watch this short video.

subtitles.original: 願いを叶える魔法があるとするなら
subtitles.english: Should there be a spell that could grant my wishes

subtitles.original: それは、あなた。
subtitles.english: It would be you

subtitles.original: 2026 Oct 6th
subtitles.english: 2026 Oct 6th

subtitles.original: JAPAN TOKYO
subtitles.english: JAPAN TOKYO

subtitles.original: IRyS 1st Concert
subtitles.english: IRyS 1st Concert

subtitles.original: VENUE: SGC HALL ARIAKE
subtitles.english: VENUE: SGC HALL ARIAKE

subtitles.original: そしてわたしは、あなたに贈る
subtitles.english: I will gift you with

subtitles.original: 奇跡で出来た、この希望を。
subtitles.english: Hope made of miracles

subtitles.original: ということで！ Yes!
subtitles.english: And so! Yes!

subtitles.original: IRyS, I will be having my very first solo live! Yay!
subtitles.english: IRyS, I will be having my very first solo live! Yay!

subtitles.original: In Tokyo, Japan! アイリスなんと...
subtitles.english: In Tokyo, Japan! IRyS will actually...

subtitles.original: 初めてのソロライブ、日本で開催されることが決定しました！ウッフー！
subtitles.english: ...have her first solo live, and it's decided it'll be held in Japan! Woo-hoo!

subtitles.original: Yes! It will be in Tokyo at the SGC Hall Ariake.
subtitles.english: Yes! It will be in Tokyo at the SGC Hall Ariake.

subtitles.original: えっと、場所は東京のSGCホール有明でございます！
subtitles.english: The venue is SGC Hall Ariake in Tokyo!

subtitles.original: 日程は10月6日。It's gonna be on a Tuesday.
subtitles.english: The date is October 6th. It's gonna be on a Tuesday.

subtitles.original: はい、火曜日でございますね。It'll be happening on...
subtitles.english: Yes, it's a Tuesday. It'll be happening on...

subtitles.original: ...October 6th, Tuesday! Yeah! Mark your calendars!
subtitles.english: ...October 6th, Tuesday! Yeah! Mark your calendars!

subtitles.original: カレンダーに書いといてや！ずっとね...
subtitles.english: Write it on your calendars! For a long time...

subtitles.original: 本当に夢に見ていたステージに立てること、すごく嬉しく思いますし...
subtitles.english: ...I've dreamed of standing on this stage, and I'm so happy...

subtitles.original: ...本当にみんなの応援のおかげです。ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: ...it's all thanks to everyone's support. Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: It's all thanks to you guys' support that I get to have this opportunity.
subtitles.english: It's all thanks to you guys' support that I get to have this opportunity.

subtitles.original: So thank you so much for all your support until now! 頑張るぞー！
subtitles.english: So thank you so much for all your support until now! I'll do my best!

subtitles.original: えっとね、I'm working really hard to make this live an amazing one...
subtitles.english: You know, I'm working really hard to make this live an amazing one...

subtitles.original: ...for you guys, a very magical one! So please look forward to it.
subtitles.english: ...for you guys, a very magical one! So please look forward to it.

subtitles.original: Make sure you definitely come! If you don't come, I'll be sad.
subtitles.english: Make sure you definitely come! If you don't come, I'll be sad.

subtitles.original: If you don't come, you'll also regret it! Yes!
subtitles.english: If you don't come, you'll also regret it! Yes!

subtitles.original: あのライブに向けて、準備めちゃくちゃ頑張ってるんで！
subtitles.english: I'm working super hard on the preparations for the live!

subtitles.original: 素晴らしいライブになるように頑張ってるんで、ぜひ会場へ見に来てください！
subtitles.english: I'm doing my best to make it a wonderful live, so please come to the venue!

subtitles.original: 見に行かないとアイリス悲しいし、みんなも後悔するぞ！はい！
subtitles.english: If you don't go, IRyS will be sad, and you'll regret it too! Yes!

subtitles.original: そして！ And, along with it! Yes!
subtitles.english: And! And, along with it! Yes!

subtitles.original: I will also be releasing my very first full album! Woo-hoo!
subtitles.english: I will also be releasing my very first full album! Woo-hoo!

subtitles.original: なんとアイリス、初のフルアルバム、出ます！
subtitles.english: Actually, IRyS's first full album is coming out!

subtitles.original: なんだかんだ言ってね、今までEPだったんですけど、フルアルバムは初めてです！
subtitles.english: Believe it or not, I've only released EPs until now, so this is my first full album!

subtitles.original: Yeah, I've released EPs in the past, but this is the very first full album.
subtitles.english: Yeah, I've released EPs in the past, but this is the very first full album.

subtitles.original: So look forward to it, there's a lot of songs! The album jacket...
subtitles.english: So look forward to it, there's a lot of songs! The album jacket...

subtitles.original: じゃじゃーん！ Yeah, album jacket is by Kito Koruta-sensei!
subtitles.english: Ta-da! Yeah, the album jacket is by Kito Koruta-sensei!

subtitles.original: It's very cute! The album title is called 'DANGEROUS'. Yes!
subtitles.english: It's very cute! The album title is called 'DANGEROUS'. Yes!

subtitles.original: 何でも'RIS'を付ければいいってもんじゃないかもしれないけど...
subtitles.english: It might not be as simple as just putting 'RIS' at the end of everything...

subtitles.original: ...ちょうどはまったんでね、'DANGEROUS'な、とっても危険的でホットなアルバムになってます！
subtitles.english: ...but it fit perfectly, so 'DANGEROUS'—it's a very risky and hot album!

subtitles.original: Yes! It is written by—I mean, there are many songs written by all sorts of songwriters...
subtitles.english: Yes! It is written by—I mean, there are many songs written by all sorts of songwriters...
